seo.title: Scaling Reads | SystemDesignLaws
seo.description: Learn how to scale read-heavy systems in 3 tiers: optimize DB (indexing, denormalization), scale horizontally (replicas, sharding), add caching (Redis, CDN). Interview-ready framework.

seo.title: Real-time Updates | SystemDesignLaws
seo.description: Two hops for real-time: client-server (polling, long polling, SSE, WebSockets) and source-server (Pub/Sub). Interview framework for chat, live comments, collaborative docs.

seo.title: Dealing with Contention | SystemDesignLaws
seo.description: Solve race conditions: atomicity, pessimistic locking, optimistic concurrency, distributed locks. Ticketmaster, auction, rate limiter patterns.

seo.title: Multi-step Processes | SystemDesignLaws
seo.description: Reliable multi-step workflows: event sourcing, Temporal, Step Functions. Handle failures, compensation, human-in-the-loop. Payment and Uber-style systems.

seo.title: Scaling Writes | SystemDesignLaws
seo.description: Scale write-heavy systems: vertical scaling, database choice, sharding, queues, batching, hierarchical aggregation. YouTube, Strava, metrics.

seo.title: Handling Large Blobs | SystemDesignLaws
seo.description: Upload and store large files: multipart upload, presigned URLs, CDN, content addressing. Dropbox, YouTube-style systems.

seo.title: Managing Long Running Tasks | SystemDesignLaws
seo.description: Async job processing: queues, workers, idempotency, retries, webhooks. Video transcoding, PDF generation, notification systems.
